CORE
  • Installation
  • View page source

Installation

Requirements

  • Python 3.10 or newer

  • Conda (recommended for environment management)

  • A CUDA-capable GPU is strongly recommended for fast inference

Clone the repository

git clone https://github.com/eshasadia/CORE.git
cd CORE

Create the Conda environment

The environment.yml file contains all required dependencies:

conda env create -f environment.yml
conda activate core

Set API keys

CORE’s prompt-based tissue mask generation relies on the VisionAgent service. Export your API key before running the pipeline:

export VISION_AGENT_API_KEY="your-api-key"

Pre-trained UNet weights

UNet-based tissue mask extraction weights are hosted on Hugging Face: eshasadianasir/CORE. Download the checkpoint and point UNET_WEIGHTS_PATH in config.py to the downloaded file.
